summary: Completed comprehensive testing of gem certificate verification app export functionality and file upload format guide. Excel export works intermittently, PDF export fails due to jsPDF library loading issues, certificate links work perfectly, file format guide is properly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: jsPDF library not loading in browser runtime - PDF export completely non-functional
integration_issues.error_details: TypeError: jsPDF not found - library not available in window object despite being installed

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent download timeout issues - works sometimes but not consistently
integration_issues.error_details: Download event timeout after 10-15 seconds, though file generation appears successful

passed_tests: Manual stone ID entry with test IDs LZ1809693, LZ2107107
Stone verification API integration working correctly
Certificate links open in new tab with security attributes (target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer')
File upload format guide displays correctly in File Upload tab
Format guide contains expected sample data (inventory_id, LZ1809693, LZ2107107, LZ2140682)
UI navigation between Manual Entry and File Upload tabs
Results table displays verification data correctly
App loads and renders without console errors

success_percentage.backend: 100% - No backend testing required per instructions
success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Major features work except PDF export and intermittent Excel export issues

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix PDF export functionality - jsPDF library not loading in browser. Investigate build/bundling configuration. Also investigate intermittent Excel download timeout issues. Consider alternative PDF generation approach or CDN loading for jsPDF.
